x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: Agent Workspace is where Now Assist CSM AI features (summaries, suggested responses, next best actions) surface to agents.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Activate CSM Workspace via sys_plugins_list.do. Configure workspace views and layouts for your CSM agent teams. Now Assist CSM AI features are delivered exclusively through the CSM Workspace.

sys_update_version.name: x_snc_airop_check_definition_c3f81dc7cfd587108935fb251d851c9c
sys_update_version.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update table="x_snc_airop_check_definition"><x_snc_airop_check_definition action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><ai_justification><![CDATA[Agent Workspace is where Now Assist CSM AI features (summaries, suggested responses, next best actions) surface to agents.]]></ai_justification><check_name>CSM Agent Workspace Configuration</check_name><check_script><![CDATA[(function(checkDef, dateFilter) {
    var ga = new GlideAggregate('sys_plugins');
    ga.addQuery('name', 'CSM Workspace');
    ga.addQuery('active', true);
    ga.addAggregate('COUNT');
    ga.query();
    var count = ga.next() ? parseInt(ga.getAggregate('COUNT')) : 0;

    if (count >= 1) {
        return {
            status: 'ready',
            actualValue: 'CSM Workspace plugin is active',
            finding: 'CSM Workspace is active. Now Assist CSM AI features — including case summarization and similar case suggestions — are visible to agents.'
        };
    } else {
        return {
            status: 'not_ready',
            actualValue: 'CSM Workspace plugin not found or inactive',
            finding: 'CSM Workspace is not active. Now Assist CSM AI features surface exclusively in the CSM Workspace — agents cannot see AI insights without it.'
        };
    }
})]]></check_script><is_active>true</is_active><is_clone_sensitive>false</is_clone_sensitive><is_manual>false</is_manual><module>CSM</module><number>CHK0000419</number><order>70</order><remediation_guidance>Activate CSM Workspace via sys_plugins_list.do. Configure workspace views and layouts for your CSM agent teams. Now Assist CSM AI features are delivered exclusively through the CSM Workspace.</remediation_guidance><sys_class_name>x_snc_airop_check_definition</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2026-06-10 06:41:19</sys_created_on><sys_id>c3f81dc7cfd587108935fb251d851c9c</sys_id><sys_mod_count>1</sys_mod_count><sys_name>CSM Agent Workspace Configuration</sys_name><sys_package display_value="ServiceNow AI Readiness Optimization Platform" source="x_snc_airop">73e2562fcf244b908935fb251d851c78</sys_package><sys_policy/><sys_scope display_value="ServiceNow AI Readiness Optimization Platform">73e2562fcf244b908935fb251d851c78</sys_scope><sys_update_name>x_snc_airop_check_definition_c3f81dc7cfd587108935fb251d851c9c</sys_update_name><sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2026-06-10 06:54:02</sys_updated_on></x_snc_airop_check_definition></record_update>
